mainEntity.name: Can I get temporary disability if the accident just made an old injury worse?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. In Utah and Idaho, you are entitled to benefits if a work accident aggravates or worsens a pre-existing condition. The insurance company must pay if the work event was a contributing factor to your inability to work.
